topic: ACL main Ethical Considerations page-9 real-deployment boundary polish

before_text_matches: page 9 line 419: treat success in synthetic scenes as proof
page 9 line 420: for real settings. That marks the evidence
defect.reader_effect: The wording was correctly bounded but proof for real settings was less precise and less ACL-like than the paper's evidence-gate framing.

changes.summary: Rewrote the ethics warning to say synthetic-scene success should not be treated as evidence for real deployment.
Changed the following sentence to That distinction marks the evidence boundary.

after_evidence.targeted_scan_result: Page 9 shows the revised evidence-for-real-deployment wording without new body-text linebreak hyphenation.
after_evidence.full_scan_result: The strict after scan reports only the existing explicit human-subject wording and normal reference-column hyphenation on pages 9-10.
after_evidence.visual_result: The Ethical Considerations paragraph and adjacent References column remain visually stable.

claim_boundary: Ethical Considerations prose only. No metrics, evidence pools, figures, tables, citations, metadata, or supported/forbidden claim scopes were changed.
residual_risk: Reference pages retain normal reference-column hyphenation.
